dataid="5e5ad1c4a464178faa90c134d62b7d0a"><datadesc>问题三：要交出去的东西，怎么让AI帮你做到80分？</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:43:42</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656222</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>867745384219599783</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="54b274742013f2eee8cd4b3782719ea8"><datadesc>最后一个事，也是我觉得最实用的</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:43:49</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656229</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>1311773921166970402</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="15b168d312fdc543059b037dfdbeeba3"><datadesc>不管你是在写简历、做PPT、写一份报告、还是准备一段自我介绍——只要这个东西要交到别人手里，AI都能帮你从60分拉到80分</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:43:59</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656239</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>5022207105265813345</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="d7578ee5e90654cbd6053191caedcba1"><datadesc>拿简历举例。最笨的写法是把所有经历往上堆。最聪明的做法是针对每份需求改一版</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:44:21</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656261</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>2493258405245516951</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="f76e97678231b1f86bb17fe85c30cd38"><datadesc>我做了四份定制简历，东方久乐写硬件测试经历，三旺写通信相关项目，传泰写FPGA开发。不是造假，是同一块石头对不同人展现不同的面</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:44:42</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656282</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>8424689227378024757</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="cfe386d746557bbd0d6ec2b9e6fd689d"><datadesc>项目经历怎么包装？三个原则。第一，身份写&quot;项目负责人&quot;，不写&quot;独立完成&quot;——负责人暗示领导力。第二，每条经历必须带数字——延迟降到多少、正确率多少、代码量多少行。没有数字等于没有说服力。第三，不会写就让AI帮你用STAR法则重写——就是把&quot;做了什么&quot;变成&quot;面对什么挑战、采取什么行动、拿到什么结果&quot;</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:45:20</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656320</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>8664241258472466413</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="62fb7bb46557eaf2c663c8c5aeb6dc76"><datadesc>周三周四的嘉宾已经教了大家怎么用AI提效、怎么做PPT了。今天我再补一个场景：用AI模拟面试或模拟答辩。让AI扮演对方追着你问，它不会给你面子，会一直追问到你答不上来。答不上来的地方，就是你要准备的地方</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:46:43</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656403</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>9035497756477362971</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="4959de8b5fe93615910aa9c77394552a"><datadesc>面试的时候我还做了一件事：带上我的代码。RTL代码加波形截图，打印出来往桌上一放。面试官一看就知道你是真做过的，不是编的</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:47:09</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656429</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>1463207463018155133</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="8177686f501a24b4613fa8802ae8a7ea"><datadesc>你做任何东西都一样——带&quot;证据&quot;去，比你说一百句都管用</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:47:19</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656439</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>1337862509191068082</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="0d6252988328628c436fd56e841120ee"><datadesc>我给大家这周末大家能去实操的三件事：</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:48:32</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656512</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>2909477420569138769</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="83e83477bce485b6a82755a610399eff"><datadesc>第一，找一个你最近要面对的关键场合——可以是面试、答辩、展示、甚至一次找老师谈话——把你的背景和对方的需求一起丢给AI，让它帮你拆核心要点</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:48:43</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656523</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>7598597083543042424</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="e3aeed80170d7dbfe6cde1d2d16092e7"><datadesc>第二，用STAR法则改一段你的经历。任何经历都行，改完发群里让大家帮看看</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:49:17</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656557</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>2907322552418217270</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="02f2f39437f40e09c13628026162b461"><datadesc>第三，找一个人互相模拟一次——你当面试官追着他问，他当面试官追着你问。三轮下来你就知道自己的短板在哪了</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:49:36</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656576</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>7167630307250307356</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="bd90f8d438f5b54187b10b7a6c18ddb2"><datadesc>最后预告一件事——</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:49:46</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656586</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>5624402379911213603</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="f0e5ff8640a392dcdd5c2cf345b4b8e2"><datadesc>本周六上午10点，我会做一场AI模拟面试的直播。现场用AI模拟真实面试场景，大家可以看到AI是怎么追问的、怎么帮你发现准备盲区的。不管你是在准备实习、考研复试、还是竞赛答辩，这个方法都适用。到时候在实习群里发链接</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:50:27</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656627</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>312574618336821964</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="76c853bd37bd601c0a4bddab063b8645"><datadesc>这5天从认知到方法到工具到实战，其实就讲了一件事：&#x0A;&#x0A;你不需要等到准备好了才开始。你开始了，才会准备好</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:51:14</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656674</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>296429297505899136</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem><dataitem datatype="1" dataid="eff3690eb6ad8b5d235832118a85a285"><datadesc>好了，这几天辛苦大家了。有问题的私聊我噢</datadesc><sourcename>我</sourcename><sourceheadurl>https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/ver_1/vf7Pft0Q15W1WwGFvh8vq47knGQjSB82ZQHhxTL3zDiayfWgVL3UBfRzZfAXebSJjloE9gpWB51AoDPoPnibiaBAogCD7IZqfQCibW7biaMNXyia9K6mgOspd15TnlBrv8joWR/96</sourceheadurl><sourcetime>2026-06-05&#x20;18:52:12</sourcetime><srcMsgCreateTime>1780656732</srcMsgCreateTime><fromnewmsgid>7428160197001958899</fromnewmsgid><dataitemsource><hashusername>8c3b271acb21ec18a8a228791c41171eec793630148a5f03e0564e95716f81ac</hashusername></dataitemsource></dataitem></datalist><isChatRoom>1</isChatRoom></recordinfo>]]></recorditem>

**[2026-06-06 18:12:34] 詹子诺**：
看的叔叔心都化了
**[2026-06-06 18:12:36] 詹子诺**：[表情]
**[2026-06-06 18:13:06] 小黎**：嘉宾介绍：
子明，广师大大一，机创工作室成员，入驻校级众创空间，Trae校园大使,
破界青年OPC联盟盟友。
	
参与多个省级项目。
做过企业 API Key 管理系统，设计各种风格的精美网页和海报。
跑通竞赛，项目，面试等多个AI工作流

私域裂变操盘。
2天从0到1，跑通私域裂变发售全流程，
7天成交8单，变现近四位数
7天裂变180+

可提供资源：
1. 项目官网页、海报、路演视觉等展示包装设计
2. 主流大模型、Claude Code、Codex等AI 开发工具配置与使用咨询
3. 小型 AI 应用、自动化流程、项目原型开发支持
4. 校内资源链接（众创中心、机创工作室、Trae 生态）
